title: impatiens balfourii var. meeboldii
intro: Impatiens balfourii var. meeboldii, also known as the Himalayan Balsam or Balsam, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Impatiens balfourii var. meeboldii include its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to relieve urinary tract issues, and its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
